title.en: After a long time, Ye Tian finally broke throug...

content.en:
A steady stream of energy pours into the heart, prompting the heart to undergo rapid transformation.

And with the metamorphosis of the heart, the sixth blood transformation of immeasurable blood is about to begin.

Soon, Ye Tian's physical strength continued to become stronger, and his aura became more and more terrifying.

The void where the shock flow was located kept collapsing, as if it couldn't withstand the breath of Ye Tian's breakthrough.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally broke through completely.

Six Blood Transformation Realms, it's here!

"Ancient God and Demon Fist!"

Ye Tian blasted out with a punch, and the surrounding territory turned into nothingness, and even a fragment of the Ancient Treasure Land nearby was completely annihilated.

Subsequently, he continued to attack in this area, and in this way, he completely controlled the skyrocketing flesh and blood.

Gradually, his breath stabilized.

"My current strength has surpassed that of Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, and I can be called invincible in the eight blood transformation realms!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In other words, with his current strength, he could not take the White Shadow Elephant Clan and the Ancient Demon Ape Clan in his eyes.

Because as far as he knew, the White Shadow Elephant Clan and the Ancient Demon Ape Clan didn't seem to have the powerhouses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, as long as they didn't have the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, they wouldn't be his opponents.

Even if he encounters a powerhouse in the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, he can escape with his primeval technique.

"I have to exchange the Ancient Gold Leaf that recorded the Ancient Blood Spear and the Ancient God and Demon Fist Ancient Gold Leaf in the hands of the Hays Heavenly Ancestor. "

Ye Tian immediately contacted Hayes Tianzu.

Soon, they met.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, it seems that you have given up cultivating the Ancient Blood Spear, I just said that it is too difficult to practice two Ancient Techniques, the cost is too great and there is little hope. "

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor said.

Immediately, he took out the Ancient Golden Leaf that recorded the Ancient God and Demon Fist and exchanged it with Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian exchanged the primeval gold leaf, he said, "Actually, I have practiced it!"

"What?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor suspected that he had misheard!

"I've really cultivated the Ancient Blood Spear!"

Immediately, Ye Tian directly condensed the Ancient Blood Spear in front of the Hays Heavenly Ancestor.

Seeing the Ancient Blood Spear, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was really shocked.

"How did you do that?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor couldn't help but ask.

"Talent!" Ye Tian could only explain like this, he couldn't say that he was using a replica body to keep trying and scrapping a large number of bodies, so he succeeded!

"Envy!" Hayes Heavenly Ancestor also wanted to practice the second primeval technique, but unfortunately he couldn't do it.

He didn't continue to talk to Ye Tian, because Ye Tian, who had practiced two primeval techniques, plus his cultivation had broken through to the six Blood Transformation Realms, his strength was already above him.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you only had four Blood Transformation Realms at the beginning, but I didn't expect that in such a short period of time, you would break through to six Blood Transformation Realms, and you have also practiced two ancient techniques, I can't compare with you!

Hayes Tianzu sighed.

However, he didn't know that what Ye Tian had cultivated was not two primeval techniques, but three primeval techniques!

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor has praised it, maybe you will soon be able to break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, and then it will be enough to be comparable to the top Nine Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses!" Ye Tian said.

"It's difficult, it's too difficult!" Hayes Heavenly Ancestor shook his head, "An ancient-level genius like us, if you want to break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, it is very difficult and it takes a lot of resources. Therefore, many top overlord-level forces were also unwilling to cultivate primordial-level geniuses. If they did their best, it would be no problem to cultivate a few primordial-level geniuses, but the price they paid might be able to cultivate multiple Eight Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors. "

"That's right!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Those top overlord-level forces will not deliberately cultivate primordial-level geniuses, unless there are boundary-breaking geniuses who really want to attack primordial-level geniuses, they can obtain some resource supply, but most of them have to rely on themselves.

It is precisely because of this that primeval-level geniuses are so rare.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor separated.

......

Universal City.

Ye Tian entered the Huanyu Tower.

It's been a long time since he's been here to break into the Cosmos Tower, and this time he's going to break through a few more floors at once to elevate his authority.

The fourteenth floor of the Universal Tower.

Ye Tian encountered the other party, defeated the opponent with one punch, and rushed directly over.

Fifteenth floor!

The sixteenth floor!

Ye Tiandu easily passed through.

Finally, he came to the seventeenth layer of the Cosmos Tower, and the opponent he encountered on this layer was the top strength of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm.

Rumble!!!!

The Cosmos Tower moved in a Blood Transformation creature that had changed into the Blood Transformation Realm eight times.

......

"The Cosmos Tower, you actually moved me in!"

The patriarch of the primeval demon ape, Apefu, quickly realized his situation, it was a certain Heavenly Ancestor of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm who was here to attack the seventeenth layer of the Cosmos Tower.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian and the patriarch of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan fought in ambush.

As soon as Ye Tian made a move, it was the primeval blood spear, attacking the ape!

"Ancient Blood Spear !!"

Ape Fu recognized it, and subconsciously thought it was Hayes Heavenly Ancestor.

"No, it's not the Hys Heavenly Ancestor, the Hays Heavenly Ancestor broke through the seventeenth layer of the Universal Tower countless years ago, how can it be now! Could it be a certain Heavenly Ancestor of the Hays Heavenly Ancestor's forces? No, the Hys Heavenly Ancestor's force is not strong, the Hays Heavenly Ancestor is the strongest, and the other Heavenly Ancestors haven't heard how powerful it is!"

Sarufu was puzzled.

Under the attack of the primeval blood spear, an ancient technique, the ape was gradually suppressed and was soon injured.

Injured by the primeval technique, it is difficult for the ape to recover.

As time passed, the ape couldn't bear it anymore and directly chose to admit defeat.

Swish!

Ape Fu was moved out, and Ye Tian broke through the seventeenth floor of the Cosmos Tower.

After breaking through the seventeenth layer of the Cosmos Tower, his authority was greatly increased, even an ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor had no right to view his information in the Cosmos Tower.

Break through the seventeenth floor of the Universal Tower, and the rewards on this floor are far superior to those of the other floors.

"It's a drop of primeval root marrow!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This is an incomparably precious thing, and the Cosmos Tower is still in stock.

This thing is from the Ancient Golden Tree!

The Ancient Gold Tree is full of treasures, the leaves are Ancient Gold Leaves, which gave birth to an ancient technique, and the trunk part gave birth to the Ancient Gold Juice, and the root system gave birth to the Ancient Root Essence.

The primeval root marrow was helpful to the eight Blood Transformation Realms and the nine Blood Transformation Realms, so naturally it would also help Ye Tian.

It's a pity that just a drop of primeval root marrow can't help him hit the Seven Blood Transformation Realm.

"What is the origin of the Huanyu Tower, this thing is there, if there is a master, how terrifying his master should be, it must surpass the Nine Blood Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.
